title: arenaria capillaris var. glabra
intro: Arenaria capillaris var. glabra, also known as Smooth Sandwort, is a plant species in the carnation family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Smooth Sandwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
